integration_drift_investigation.finding: EXP-258 (WIN-010) and EXP-253 (§4.2.2) appear correctly applied — misstatement language present, approximately language present. The actual drift: EXP-255 and EXP-256 were marked integrated in tracker but their content (ds-thesis-hero, falsifiability-module) was absent from generate-html.js. This run corrected the drift by applying EXP-261 (corrected hero) and EXP-256 (falsifiability module).
integration_drift_investigation.root_cause_hypothesis: A prior decider run updated the expansion tracker and closed issues without applying the actual file patches. The apply-patches.js approach cannot handle generate-html.js edits, so EXP-255/256 patches may have silently no-oped while tracker updates proceeded.
integration_drift_investigation.corrective_action: Applied EXP-261 and EXP-256 content directly to generate-html.js. All 3479 tests pass post-integration.
